repository_url.description: Git URL for the forked repository to operate on.

base_ref.description: Base branch or ref to check out before merging.

upstream_remote.description: Name of the upstream Git remote.

upstream_ref.description: Upstream branch or ref to merge forward.

cherry_picks.description: Optional list of commit SHAs to cherry-pick after the upstream merge.

config_path.description: Optional path to a future configuration file.
